auth.login_subtitle: Wọle lati tesiwaju iriri gigun ti o dara julọ.
auth.register_subtitle: Gba irin-ajo ti o dara ati ailewu.
auth.agree_to_terms: Mo gba gbogbo Awọn ofin ati Imulo Aṣiri
auth.invalid_phone: Jọwọ tẹ nọmba foonu to tọ.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Tẹ nọmba foonu ti o sopọ mọ akọọlẹ rẹ a yoo fi koodu atunto ranṣẹ si ọ.
auth.remember_password: Ṣe o ranti ọrọ igbaniwọle rẹ?
auth.otp_subtitle: Tẹ koodu OTP nọmba 6 ti a fi ranṣẹ si ọ.
auth.invalid_otp: Jọwọ tẹ koodu nọmba 6 to tọ.
auth.create_new_password_subtitle: Yan ọrọ igbaniwọle ailewu ti iwọ yoo ranti.
auth.password_too_short: Ọrọ igbaniwọle gbọdọ ni o kere ju awọn ohun kikọ 6.

profile_setup.role_selection_title: Bawo ni o ṣe gbero lati lo Chauffly?
profile_setup.passenger_description: Itunu rẹ, aabo rẹ, ati alafia ọkan rẹ nigbagbogbo ni akọkọ.
profile_setup.driver_description: Wakọ pẹlu ọla, iṣẹ ọjọgbọn, ati agbara ere ti o ga julọ.
profile_setup.corporate_description: Awọn gigun ti a ṣakoso daradara fun ẹgbẹ rẹ ati awọn alabara.
profile_setup.ride_style_placeholder: Yan iru gigun ti o baamu ipele itunu rẹ
profile_setup.accessibility_options_placeholder: Jẹ ki awakọ rẹ mọ ti o ba nilo iranlọwọ diẹ sii
profile_setup.accessibility_none: Ko si iranlọwọ ti o nilo
profile_setup.facial_verification_description: Fun aabo rẹ, a lo idanimọ oju lati jẹrisi pe o jẹ iwọ gaan lakoko awọn gbigbe ati awọn iṣe akọọlẹ ailewu. Data oju rẹ ti wa ni iṣeduro ati ti a fipamọ ni ailewu.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_1: Mu oju rẹ lẹẹkan lakoko iṣeto.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_2: Lo fun ijerisi nikan ko pin pẹlu awọn awakọ.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_3: O le mu eyi kuro nigbakugba ninu Eto.
profile_setup.facial_verification_success_description: Oju rẹ ti forukọsilẹ ni ailewu. A o lo fun awọn ijẹrisi iyara ati ailewu lakoko awọn irin-ajo.

onboarding.slide1_title:
Kaabọ si chauffly
Rin pẹlu Igboya
onboarding.slide1_description: Gbadun awọn gigun ti o dara julọ, awọn awakọ ti o gbẹkẹle, ati iriri irin-ajo ti a ṣe ni ayika itunu ati aabo.
onboarding.slide2_title: Igbadun, Nigbakugba Ti O Ba Nilo Rẹ
onboarding.slide2_description: Yan lati Go, Plus, Luxe, tabi Black — awọn gigun ti a ṣe ni pipe fun gbogbo akoko, lati awọn iṣẹ ojoojumọ si irin-ajo alaṣẹ.
onboarding.slide3_title: Aabo Rẹ Ni Pataki Julọ Fun Wa
onboarding.slide3_description: Awọn awakọ ti a ṣe ayẹwo, titọpa ni akoko gidi, idanimọ oju, ati pinpin lẹsẹkẹsẹ jẹ ki gbogbo irin-ajo wa ni aabo.

location.enable_location_description: Lati le lo iṣẹ yii, a nilo igbanilaaye lati wọle si ipo rẹ.
